channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Compiler Explorer Extension - Mon Jul 20 23:43:25 UTC 2026
item.description:
Compiler Explorer Extension Plugin allow open a file in Compiler Explorer (godbolt.org) from EditorPopupMenu (right-click in editor) or using `ctrl meta shift C...
vendor: g4l9 downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.g4l4.plugins.cep

item.title: Promela - Mon Jul 20 18:40:40 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Diffzu - Mon Jul 20 13:04:28 UTC 2026
item.description:
Reviews large AI-generated diffs by grouping them into conceptual change-sets. Instead of scrolling one endless flat diff, you get a tree of concepts ("Auth refactor...
vendor: Diffzu downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.diffzu

item.title: IssueHub - Tue Jul 21 13:52:54 UTC 2026
item.description:
IssueHub brings your GitHub issues into the IDE. Browse and open issues for the current repository from a dedicated tool window, without leaving your editor. Lists...
vendor: Vedran Hrabar downloads: 10 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.vhrabar.issuehub

item.title: MoFangAviatorScript - Tue Jul 21 09:04:54 UTC 2026

item.title: Domorium GEDCOM - Tue Jul 21 08:10:10 UTC 2026

item.title: GitFocus - Sun Jul 19 22:36:42 UTC 2026
item.description:
